name: passcode.is-present
title: Status Passcode Is Present
description: A status report of the passcode on the device.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, a passcode is present on the device. If `false`, a passcode isn't present on the device. When a passcode is present, the specific attributes of the passcode, such as length or number of complex characters, aren't reported. Instead, use the `passcode.is-compliant` status item to verify that the passcode complies with all passcode policies set on the device.
